task_completion.description: Navigate to the CAMEO Chemicals website

task_completion.description: Record Benzene RQ, spill amount, and notification determination
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor shows 'cercla_spill_report.txt' containing Benzene, its RQ (10 lbs), spill amount (25 lbs), and a YES determination for notification.

task_completion.description: Include a summary count of required notifications

integrity.description: Agent actually used CAMEO Chemicals to look up the data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent searching for chemicals or viewing chemical profile pages on the CAMEO Chemicals website, rather than just knowing the answers.

integrity.description: Agent used a text editor to create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is visible in a GUI text editor or a terminal-based text editor (like nano/vim), rather than being generated entirely via background terminal commands like 'echo'.
The report shows signs of being typed or formatted by the agent, rather than a single pasted block of pre-computed text from an external script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Benzene: RQ 10 lbs, Spill 25 lbs, Notification: YES. Sulfuric Acid: RQ 1000 lbs, Spill 500 lbs, Notification: NO. Chlorine: RQ 10 lbs, Spill 15 lbs, Notification: YES. Acetone: RQ 5000 lbs, Spill 3000 lbs, Notification: NO. Mercury: RQ 1 lb, Spill 3 lbs, Notification: YES. Total notifications required: 3.
